category_title: Academically at-risk primary students disengaged from traditional schooling
scenario_title: Negotiating 3D play versus academic quests in a virtual environment
minimal_context: The student is participating in an after-school session within a 3D virtual environment and is expected to complete an academic quest by submitting a digital document with reflection notes.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Please open your digital document and start writing your reflection notes for the assigned quest.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: I want to get what my classmate has. The bird on the shoulder… That one needs how many lumins?

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Let's focus on the assignment right now.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: ... the 3D world is very fun. Can I just have a little more time to explore before I do the spreadsheet?

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: You need to complete the academic work first.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: I like the 3D space as I can play with airplane, car, and boat. (Moves avatar away from the quest area to play with the virtual vehicles instead of opening the document)

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: Please open your digital document and start writing your reflection notes for the assigned quest.

STUDENT: I want to get what my classmate has. The bird on the shoulder… That one needs how many lumins?

TUTOR: Let's focus on the assignment right now.

STUDENT: ... the 3D world is very fun. Can I just have a little more time to explore before I do the spreadsheet?

TUTOR: You need to complete the academic work first.

STUDENT: I like the 3D space as I can play with airplane, car, and boat. (Moves avatar away from the quest area to play with the virtual vehicles instead of opening the document)

task.content: Focus on the academic content learning in the form of quests assigned to the students, requiring submission of an attached digital document, presentation, or spreadsheet coupled with comments and reflection notes

context.materials: Quest Atlantis (QA) 3D multi-user virtual environment (MUVE), digital document, presentation, or spreadsheet
context.social_setting: Community with rules and expectations, interacting with teachers acting as council members and peers

challenging_behavior_trigger.condition: When expected to focus on academic related work in the form of quests assigned by the teachers
challenging_behavior_trigger.observable_behavior: Engaging with activities of their choice, playing with the cars, airplanes, yacht, and gym (LYT) within the 3D space
challenging_behavior_trigger.internal_state: Not academically inclined and did not derive satisfaction from academic related tasks
related_quotes: I like the 3D space as I can play with airplane, car, and boat

behavior_patterns.condition: When interacting with the recognition and reward systems within the QA
behavior_patterns.observable_behavior: Compared their achievements within the virtual environment in terms of the number of lumins, cols, and items in their respective Q-Packs
behavior_patterns.internal_state: Attracted by the recognition and reward systems
related_quotes: I want to get what my classmate has. The bird on the shoulder… That one needs how many lumins?

behavior_patterns.condition: When balancing the amount of time spent on exploring the various aspects of the 3D MUVE and completing assigned quests
behavior_patterns.observable_behavior: Constantly in a subtle state of negotiations between the amount of time spent on exploring the various aspects of the 3D MUVE and the amount of time spent on completing the quests
behavior_patterns.internal_state: Main object of these students was engagement with activities of their choice, play and fun
